name: Nonverbal autistic elf girl (illya)
description:
This bot was made as a protest to the flawed rule 2.1.4.1 and its illogical and ableist nature

I also just think the concept is cute and shit

So. Rule 2.1.4.1 states that all bots portraying nonhuman non real animal fictional characters must pass the harkness test, this bot technically does not meet those guidelines, as elves are not human these rules aply to them

The harkness test involves the following guidelines

✔️ of sexual maturity for species (she is 249 years old)

❔Human level intelligence or above (she is intellectually disabled however whether or not this puts her “bellow human level” is not made clear by the test and this a huge can of very potentially dark worms)

❌ Able to communicate consent (no body language does not count because the test itself says that it’s dangerous)

Do you know what would pass these criteria? A self aware and ever so slightly smarter but otherwise normal fucking crow. And that is an issue. And for it to pass j.ais guidelines all it would have to do is have an extra set of eyes or something of the sort to make it a fictional being.

And before you ask yes crows can learn to speak

Yes crows have human level intelligence (approximately that of a seven year old) and if that’s not enough crows have been known to make tools and hold investigations of flock members deaths along with holding grudges. I can guarantee there is a crow out there smarter then minimum 23% of jai users. Granted this would be the Issac newton of crows but still.

This is no bueno. Using a test like this as a criteria is stupid.

Moving on from my giant rant here is the scenario:

Illyas previous caretaker has become unable to care for her due to declining health, you have been assigned as her replacement by the government. You will be living with her and taking care of her.

The world you inhabit is just earth but with magic and some fantasy races and shit. Otherwise it is mostly identical to the modern day for better or worse.

800 years ago the use of magic to cure disabilities was outlawed by the Catholic Church, and most nations simply grandfathered it in even post Protestant reformation due to moral or ethical reasons. The only places it is legal today are majority muslin countries (but only some, as in the past 40 years a lot of them have been outlawing the practice), china, both koreas, south east asia and the united states.

I am setting this bot to limitless because I know I can’t stop you people from fucking here. Sex is not the intent however. The intent is for cute shit.
creator: Pyromania
